Subject: Partnership Opportunity - DC Hub Data Center Intelligence Platform

Hi Team,

I'm reaching out from DC Hub (dc-hub.replit.app), a comprehensive data center intelligence platform tracking 9632+ facilities worldwide.

We've built something unique:
- Real-time M&A deal tracking (1407+ deals, $267172672B+ volume)
- 8266.3 GW capacity pipeline monitoring
- Land & Power analysis with 40+ infrastructure layers
- API-first architecture for easy integration

I believe there's a strong opportunity for DataCenterHawk and DC Hub to collaborate:
Real-time capacity pipeline data, M&A tracking

Would you be open to a brief call to explore how we might work together?

Best regards,
DC Hub Team

Our unique data includes:
- 1407+ M&A transactions with values
- 8266.3 GW capacity pipeline (planned + under construction)

Would you be interested in a data-sharing partnership? We could provide API access in exchange for cross-promotion.

DC Hub Team
